name: Convectrix
description: When its twin-lasers converge on a target a circuit is created, frying the subject.

components.name: Blueprint
components.description: When its twin-lasers converge on a target a circuit is created, frying the subject.

components.name: Control Module
components.description:
Autonomy processor for Robotics. A Corpus design.

Location: Europa, Neptune, and the Void

components.name: Fieldron
components.description:
ClanTech weaponized containment field to contain superheated substances.

Location: Clan Research (Energy Lab in the Dojo) and Corpus Invasion Rewards

components.name: Forma
components.description: This shape-altering component is fundamental to Orokin construction. Allows you to change the polarity of a mod slot on a Warframe, Companions or Weapon and then resets their affinity to Unranked. This can only be used on max Rank Warframes, Companions and Weapons.

components.name: Oxium
components.description:
Oxium is a rare lighter than air alloy of Orokin origin, used in certain Corpus Robotics.

Location: Venus, Jupiter, Mars, Neptune, Pluto, Eris, Europa, and Lua.

patchlogs.name: Heart of Deimos: Nezha Prime: 29.3.0 + 29.3.0.1
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed a crash in the Simulacrum while firing a Convectrix that had max ranked Tainted Shell and Narrow Barrel Mods equipped.

patchlogs.name: The Old Blood: Hotfix 26.0.3
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Lanka, Opticor, Helios, Convectrix & Arca Plasmor Research missing from the Energy Lab.

patchlogs.name: Shrine of the Eidolon: Hotfix 22.13.4
patchlogs.changes:
Convectrix Alt Fire beams now continuously sweep back and forth.
Fixed the Convectrix showing different Ammo types between fire modes. (Alt-fire is now using Shotgun shells like Primary fire)
Fixed Convectrix beams visually crossing each other.

patchlogs.name: Hydroid Prime: Update 21.6.0
patchlogs.fixes: Fixed the Convectrix not having a pickup context action when disarmed by a Drahk Master.

patchlogs.name: Update 17.5: The Jordas Precept. + Hotfix 17.5.1
patchlogs.additions: Convectrix: When its twin-lasers converge on a target a circuit is created, frying the subject.
